typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Cfg_BypassDailyFundBreakdown as boolean (),
	Cfg_DefaultErrorLevel as integer (),
	Cfg_ImportRunId as integer (),
	Cfg_ServiceHostTcpUri as string (),
	ChannelName as string ()
}

source(output(
		ImportRunId as integer,
		ImportFileId as integer,
		AssetName as string,
		MarketValue as string,
		RowNumber as integer,
		AccountId as string,
		ValuationDate as timestamp,
		BaseUnits as string,
		Id as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT Id, ImportRunId, ImportFileId, RowNumber, ValuationDate, AccountId, AssetName, MarketValue, BaseUnits FROM  Staging.ChannelAssetExtract WHERE (ImportRunId = ?)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Positionsextract	source(output(
		Id as integer,
		ChannelName as string,
		ChannelScheme as string,
		ClientName as string,
		ClientLocation as string,
		SchemeName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        Id, ChannelName, UPPER(ChannelScheme) AS ChannelScheme, ClientName, ClientLocation, SchemeName FROM            Lookup.ChannelScheme',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupclientlocationandschemenamesLKPTABLE	source(output(
		AssetName as string,
		ChannelName as string,
		Namespace as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        UPPER(AssetName) AssetName, ChannelName, Namespace FROM            Lookup.ChannelAsset',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupfundnamespacesLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ClientName as string,
		Location as string,
		SchemeName as string,
		SchemeId as integer,
		ClientLocationId as integer,
		DailyValuationFeed as boolean,
		FundDailyValuationEnabled as boolean
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT c.ClientName, Clients.Location.Description AS Location, s.SchemeName, s.id AS SchemeId, cl.ID AS ClientLocationId, s.DailyValuationFeed, FundDailyValuationEnabled  FROM  Clients.Client AS c INNER JOIN          Clients.ClientLocation AS cl ON c.ID = cl.ClientId INNER JOIN          Clients.Scheme AS s ON s.ClientLocationID = cl.ID INNER JOIN          Clients.Location ON cl.LocationId = Clients.Location.Id',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupschemeidLKPTABLE
Positionsextract derive(AccountIdConverted = upper(left(trim(AccountId), 255)),
		AssetNameConverted = upper(left(trim(AssetName), 255)),
		MarketValueConverted = toDouble((trim(MarketValue))),
		ChannelName = $Package__ChannelName,
		BaseUnitsConverted = toDouble((trim(BaseUnits)))) ~> Convertcolumnsreplaceimportrunid
Convertcolumnsreplaceimportrunid split((!(isNull(AssetNameConverted)) && length(AssetNameConverted) == 0) && isNull(MarketValueConverted),isNull(MarketValueConverted), disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit@(ThrowAway,NoMV,OK)
ConditionalSplit@NoMV derive(ErrorLevel = $Package__Cfg_DefaultErrorLevel,
		Message = left('Invalid market value: ' + trim(MarketValue), 255),
		Ordering = 10440) ~> Error10440
ConditionalSplit@OK,LookupclientlocationandschemenamesLKPTABLE lookup(ConditionalSplit@OK@ChannelName == ChannelName && AccountIdConverted == ChannelScheme,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupclientlocationandschemenames
Error10440 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		RowNumber as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		Ordering as integer,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		RowNumber,
		ImportRunId,
		Message,
		Ordering,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror10440
Lookupclientlocationandschemenames split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupclientlocationandschemenamesIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupclientlocationandschemenamesIsMatch@Match,LookupschemeidLKPTABLE lookup(LookupclientlocationandschemenamesIsMatch@Match@ClientName == LookupschemeidLKPTABLE@ClientName && ClientLocation == Location && LookupclientlocationandschemenamesIsMatch@Match@SchemeName == LookupschemeidLKPTABLE@SchemeName,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupschemeid
LookupclientlocationandschemenamesIsMatch@NotMatch derive(ErrorLevel = $Package__Cfg_DefaultErrorLevel,
		Message = left('Failed to look up client, location & scheme for Account: ' + AccountNumberConverted, 255),
		Ordering = 10401) ~> Error10401
Lookupschemeid select(mapColumn(
		ClientName = LookupschemeidLKPTABLE@ClientName,
		Location = Location,
		SchemeName = LookupschemeidLKPTABLE@SchemeName,
		SchemeId = SchemeId,
		ClientLocationId = ClientLocationId,
		DailyValuationFeed = DailyValuationFeed,
		FundDailyValuationEnabled = FundDailyValuationEnabled,
		ClientLocation = ClientLocation,
		{} = {},
		AccountIdConverted = AccountIdConverted,
		AssetNameConverted = AssetNameConverted,
		MarketValueConverted = MarketValueConverted,
		ChannelName = ChannelName,
		BaseUnitsConverted = BaseUnitsConverted,
		ImportRunId = ImportRunId,
		ImportFileId = ImportFileId,
		AssetName = AssetName,
		MarketValue = MarketValue,
		RowNumber = RowNumber,
		AccountId = AccountId,
		ValuationDate = ValuationDate,
		BaseUnits = BaseUnits,
		Id = Id
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupschemeidSelect
Error10401 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		RowNumber as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		Ordering as integer,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		RowNumber,
		ImportRunId,
		Message,
		Ordering,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror10401
LookupschemeidSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupschemeidIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupschemeidIsMatch@Match split(DailyValuationFeed == true(), disjoint: true) ~> Dailyfeedenabled@(Yes,No)
LookupschemeidIsMatch@NotMatch derive(ErrorLevel = $Package__Cfg_DefaultErrorLevel,
		Message = left('Failed to look up SchemeId from: ' + ClientName + '\\' + ClientLocation + '\\' + SchemeName, 255),
		Ordering = 10410) ~> Error10410
Dailyfeedenabled@DailyfeedenabledTOIsSchemeFundDVEnabledLINK split(FundDailyValuationEnabled && !($Package__Cfg_BypassDailyFundBreakdown), disjoint: true) ~> IsSchemeFundDVEnabled@(FundDVEnabled,Ignore)
Dailyfeedenabled@No sort(asc(ClientName, false),asc(ClientLocation, false),asc(ImportRunId, false),asc(ImportFileId, false),asc(SchemeName, false)) ~> AggregateClientLocation
Error10410 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		RowNumber as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		Ordering as integer,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		RowNumber,
		ImportRunId,
		Message,
		Ordering,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror10410
AggregateClientLocation window(over(ClientName,
		ClientLocation,
		ImportRunId,
		ImportFileId,
		SchemeName),
	asc(ClientName, true),
	asc(ClientLocation, true),
	asc(ImportRunId, true),
	asc(ImportFileId, true),
	asc(SchemeName, true),
	Rank_col = rowNumber()) ~> AggregateClientLocationdistinct
IsSchemeFundDVEnabled@FundDVEnabled,LookupfundnamespacesLKPTABLE lookup(IsSchemeFundDVEnabled@FundDVEnabled@ChannelName == LookupfundnamespacesLKPTABLE@ChannelName && AssetNameConverted == LookupfundnamespacesLKPTABLE@AssetName,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupfundnamespaces
AggregateClientLocationdistinct filter(Rank_col == 1) ~> AggregateClientLocationdistinctFilterComponent
Dailyfeedenabled@Yes aggregate(groupBy(ValuationDate,SchemeId,ImportRunId,ImportFileId,ClientLocationId),
	MarketValueTotal = sum(MarketValueConverted)) ~> Aggregatebyscheme
Lookupfundnamespaces select(mapColumn(
		{} = {},
		SchemeId = SchemeId,
		ClientLocationId = ClientLocationId,
		DailyValuationFeed = DailyValuationFeed,
		FundDailyValuationEnabled = FundDailyValuationEnabled,
		ClientName = ClientName,
		ClientLocation = ClientLocation,
		SchemeName = SchemeName,
		AccountIdConverted = AccountIdConverted,
		AssetNameConverted = AssetNameConverted,
		MarketValueConverted = MarketValueConverted,
		ChannelName = LookupfundnamespacesLKPTABLE@ChannelName,
		BaseUnitsConverted = BaseUnitsConverted,
		ImportRunId = ImportRunId,
		ImportFileId = ImportFileId,
		AssetName = LookupfundnamespacesLKPTABLE@AssetName,
		MarketValue = MarketValue,
		RowNumber = RowNumber,
		AccountId = AccountId,
		ValuationDate = ValuationDate,
		BaseUnits = BaseUnits,
		Id = Id,
		Namespace = Namespace
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupfundnamespacesSelect
AggregateClientLocationdistinctFilterComponent derive(ErrorLevel = 10415,
		Message = left(ClientName + '\\' + ClientLocation + '\\' + SchemeName + ' is not enabled for daily asset feed (Client.Scheme table in LV)', 255)) ~> Error10415
Aggregatebyscheme sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		MarketValue as double,
		ValuationDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ImportRunId as integer,
		SchemeId as integer,
		ClientLocationId as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		MarketValue = MarketValueTotal,
		ValuationDate,
		ImportRunId,
		SchemeId,
		ClientLocationId)) ~> DVTransform
LookupfundnamespacesSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupfundnamespacesIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
Error10415 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		ImportRunId,
		Message,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror10415
LookupfundnamespacesIsMatch@Match split(isNull(Namespace), disjoint: true) ~> Checknamespace@(Nonamespace,OK)
LookupfundnamespacesIsMatch@NotMatch derive(ErrorLevel = 14220,
		Message = left('Failed to look up ChannelAsset with asset name: ' + AssetNameConverted, 255)) ~> Error14220
Error14220 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		RowNumber as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		RowNumber,
		ImportRunId,
		Message,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror14220
Checknamespace@Nonamespace derive(ErrorLevel = 14221,
		Message = left('Channel asset is not mapped to a fund. Asset name: ' + AssetNameConverted, 255)) ~> Error14221
Checknamespace@OK aggregate(groupBy(ImportRunId,ImportFileId,ValuationDate,Namespace,ClientLocationId,SchemeId),
	RowNumber = min(RowNumber),
		MarketValueConverted = sum(MarketValueConverted),
		BaseUnitsConverted = sum(BaseUnitsConverted)) ~> Aggregate
Error14221 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		RowNumber as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		RowNumber,
		ImportRunId,
		Message,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror14221
Aggregate sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		BaseUnits as double,
		MarketValue as double,
		RowNumber as integer,
		ValuationDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ImportRunId as integer,
		SchemeId as integer,
		ClientLocationId as integer,
		Namespace as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		BaseUnits = BaseUnitsConverted,
		MarketValue = MarketValueConverted,
		RowNumber,
		ValuationDate,
		ImportRunId,
		SchemeId,
		ClientLocationId,
		Namespace)) ~> FundTransform
